// room script file
#define STEPS_UNTIL_DIR 10
int steps = STEPS_UNTIL_DIR;
int lastx = -1;
int lasty = -1;

#sectionstart room_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function room_a (){
  // script for room: Player enters screen (before fadein)
  SetMusicVolume (2);
  SetMusicRepeat (1);
  SetCharacterClickable (BALL, 0);
  PlayMusic (7);
  SetObjectClickable (0, 0);
  SetObjectClickable (1, 0);
  init_object (130, 0);
  if (GetPlayerCharacter () == POLICE)
  {
    character [GetPlayerCharacter ()].x = 60;
    character [GetPlayerCharacter ()].y = 134;
    FaceDirection (GetPlayerCharacter (), DIR_RIGHT);
    ReleaseCharacterView (GetPlayerCharacter ());
  }
  AlarmSound ();
}
#sectionend room_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart room_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function room_b (){
  // script for room: Player enters screen (after fadein)
  if (GetPlayerCharacter () == POLICE)
  {
    Wait (10);
    // shut door
    SetGlobalInt (130, 2);
    ObjectOff (0);
    PlaySound (44);
    Wait (10);
    MoveCharacterBlocking (GetPlayerCharacter (), 295, 131, 0);
    FaceCharacter (GetPlayerCharacter (), METEOR);
    DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "Sooo, it's you,");
    DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "...slimy purple meteor.");
    DisplaySpeech (METEOR, "Oh no! You found me!");
    DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "You're coming with me crater-head!");
    Wait (15);
    PlaySound (42);
    ChangeCharacterView (GetPlayerCharacter (), 105);
    ChangeCharacterView (METEOR, 105);
    Wait (30);
    FinishCutscene (0);
    character [POLICE].room = -1;
    character [METEOR].room = -1;
    SetGlobalInt (262, 1);
    SetGlobalInt (294, 1);
  }
}
#sectionend room_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart room_c  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function room_c (){
  // script for room: Repeatedly execute
  if (GetGlobalInt (294) == 0)
  {
    // FIREBALL-Script
    int charid = GetPlayerCharacter ();
    int px = character [charid].x;
    int py = character [charid].y;
    // check distance
    int dx = px - character [BALL].x;
    int dy = py - character [BALL].y;
    if ((dx * dx + dy * dy) <= 500)
    {
      // HUNTER catches PLAYER character
      if (GetGlobalInt (87) == 1)
      {
        // Animation, wie Feuerball vom Schutzanzug absorbiert wird.
        character [BALL].x = 333;
        character [BALL].y = 90;
        lastx = -1;
        lasty = -1;
      }
      else // kein Schutzanzug
      {
        // Standardfunktion:
        // bspw. Animation des getroffenen Characters
        ObjectOff (1);
        BeginCutscene (NO_CHAR);
        PlayerDies ();
      }
    }
    else if (steps <= 0)
    {
      if ((px != lastx) || (py != lasty))
      {
        // correct HUNTER's direction
        MoveCharacterDirect (BALL, px, py);
        lastx = px;
        lasty = py;
      }
      steps = STEPS_UNTIL_DIR;
    }
    else
    {
      steps--;
    }
  }
}
#sectionend room_c  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot4_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot4_a (){
  // script for hotspot4: Any click on hotspot
  SetDoorStrings ("", "", "");
  if (any_click_on_door_special (130, 0, 60, 134, DIR_LEFT, 34, 584, 133, DIR_LEFT, 5, 44, -1, 2) == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot4_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot5_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot5_a (){
  // script for hotspot5: Any click on hotspot
  int result = any_click_on_door (131, 1, 415, 134, DIR_RIGHT, 30, 180, 123, DIR_RIGHT);
  if (result == 2) 
  {
    SetGlobalInt (313, 1);
    if (GetGlobalInt (245) != 0) PlacePC (52, 108, DIR_DOWN);
  }
  else if (result == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot5_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart object2_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function object2_a (){
  // script for object2: Any click on object
  if ((UsedAction (A_PUSH)) || (UsedAction (A_USE)))
  {
    if (GetGlobalInt (141) == 0)
    {
      if (MovePlayer (140, 128))
      {
        FaceLocation (GetPlayerCharacter (), 140, 127);
        Wait (5);
        PlaySound (19);
        SetObjectGraphic (2, 232);
        SetGlobalInt (141, 1);
        SetGlobalInt (242, 3);
        Wait (25);
        BeginCutscene (FRED);
      }
    }
  }
  else if (UsedAction (A_LOOK_AT))
  {
    DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "It's a large switch.");
  }
  else if (UsedAction (A_WALK_TO))
  {
    if (MovePlayer (140, 128))
    {
      FaceLocation (GetPlayerCharacter (), 140, 127);
    }
  }
  else Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend object2_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
